objects: a tall totem of bones and skulls
prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile is a DIFFERENT huge towering object standing FREE in empty space, resting on a small flat patch of packed brown dirt; the object rises straight up and IS the sprite. CRITICAL: the entire background is FULLY TRANSPARENT and there is NO black outline, NO dark border, NO frame, NO box, NO rectangle, NO square, NO cube edges and NO wireframe anywhere around the tile or the object — the object's silhouette is soft and organic against empty transparency, with no containing lines or hard straight edges enclosing it. Do NOT stand it on a raised block, cube, column, box, crate or pedestal, and do NOT draw the ground as a raised cube: just a small low patch at its base. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a massive gnarled dead tree 2) a colossal rock-capped dirt pillar 3) a towering dirt-and-rock butte 4) a tall totem of bones and skulls 5) a wind-worn dirt spire 6) a giant dead cypress 7) a towering wind-carved hoodoo 8) a towering badlands rock stack 9) a colossal ancient dead tree 10) a giant saguaro cactus. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
